title: Unni Kannan
subTitle: Unnikannan depicts the time when he was the son of Yashoda and Nandagopan in Ambadi. The various stages of Krishna's growth and the events that took place during that time are beautifully depicted in this series. Putana, Mahavishnu, and Kamsa all appear as characters.
